appliedUpdates.description: Fixed test_reconstruction_error_within_tolerance to train codebook before measuring error. Increased training steps to 500, added 0.0*quantized.sum() trick for gradient graph.
Fixed test_codebook_updates_during_training and test_vq_loss_decreases_with_training to use loss = vq_loss + 0.0*quantized.sum() for proper gradient graph.
Fixed test_cosine_similarity_improvement by detaching latent and using separate optimizer for latent code. Added latent_optimizer.zero_grad() call.
